explainer:
We run our parties in DIY venues. All measurements were taken by our team and are accurate to the best of our knowledge. If you have any questions, please contact us via email or Instagram.

Email: Info@plastyk.co.uk
Instagram: @plastyk__

venues.name: VENUE MOT
venues.intro: Events take place in one or both rooms. Single room events use Unit 20.

subsections.heading: Entrance
paragraphs: 66cm wide, opens inward, 11cm step. Hallway 82cm wide → second door 67cm, step free.
Cloakroom left of entrance, counter height 130cm.
Fire door near entrance: 130cm wide, 4cm step (this door can be opened by MOT staff on request).

subsections.heading: Main space
paragraphs: Step free to the bar and toilets. Bar height 120cm. DJ booth at back centre.
Fire door on left side of DJ booth: 108cm wide, 5cm step down.
Smoking area accessed via door on right side of DJ booth.

subsections.heading: Smoking area
paragraphs: Door 86cm (step free) → hallway 104cm → second door 82cm with 5cm step.
Seating available, some with back support. Partially covered.

subsections.heading: Toilets
paragraphs: Door 82cm. Sink left, recessed (70cm), height 99cm.
4 cubicles, inward opening cowboy doors, 70cm wide, approx 100cm deep. Tight, no grab rails.

subsections.heading: Approach
paragraphs: Pavement has obstacles. Clear pavement path approx 160cm wide.

subsections.heading: Entrance
paragraphs: Door opens outward with a 14cm step and incline.
Hallway 100cm wide x 163cm long. Cloakroom left, height 105cm.

subsections.heading: Main space
paragraphs: Second door 74cm, step free. Step free to the bar and toilets.
Bar height 120cm.
Fire door: 140cm wide, 10cm step (this door can be opened by MOT staff on request).

subsections.heading: Club entry
paragraphs: Through a hanging curtain (usually kept open during events).
DJ booth at back centre.
Fire door on left side of DJ booth: 110cm wide, accessed via two 2cm steps (8cm gap).
Smoking area accessed via door on right side of DJ booth.

subsections.heading: Smoking area
paragraphs: Door 89cm (step free) → hallway 105cm → second door 81cm with 5cm step.
Seating available, some with back support. Partially covered.

subsections.heading: Toilets
paragraphs: Main door 70cm → sink area 130 x 160cm, sink height 100cm.
Second door 73cm (step free).
3 cubicles, inward opening cowboy doors, approx 65cm wide.
Larger toilet: Door 63cm, inward opening. Size 126 x 190cm. No grab rails, limited turning space.
2 portable toilets outside each unit. Standard size approx 115cm x 125cm. Each has a 14cm step.
If both rooms are in use: Connecting the doorway between smoking areas is 90cm wide and step free.
Venue MOT is in an industrial area in South East London.
Surrey Quays railway station (Overground): 15–20 min walk. Most common route. Pavements + industrial roads, not well lit. Avoid walking alone at night.
South Bermondsey railway station: 10–15 min walk. Uneven surfaces, low lighting.
Bermondsey Underground station (Jubilee line): 20–25 min walk. Step free access, better lit.
Buses: 5–10 min walk (Old Kent Road area), final stretch via industrial roads.
Taxi / ride share: drop off at main gate, approx 1 min walk to entrance.
Through industrial area. There may be obstacles on the path.
There are barriers outside for queue control. Step free.
The front door is 146cm wide with a slight slant and no step. It opens directly into a seating area with couch and bar. The bar height is 115cm.
Access to the club space is via two doors with flaps, each 114cm wide.
The cloakroom is immediately on the right upon entry, with counter heights of 100cm (lower) and 117cm (higher). The DJ booth is located at the back centre of the room.
The seating area is located on the left side of the main room and is accessed via 13 steps, each 23cm high. The area includes couches, chairs, and armchairs.
The toilets are located underneath the seating area on the left side of the main room. The entrance is a cowboy-style door opening inwards, 89cm wide. There is a urinal area with 2–3 positions.
There are 4 small cubicles with doors 74cm wide opening outwards, with a 19cm step up to access.
There is 1 larger cubicle with an 81cm outward-opening door and no step. The internal dimensions are 147cm x 162cm. A small rail is present, and the sink height is 80cm.
The shared sink area has 2 sinks at a height of 92cm.
The smoking area is located at the front of the venue. It is partially covered and includes tables and benches.
The venue is located in Tottenham Hale, within an industrial area. The surrounding streets are generally wide and flat, but can be quieter at night with variable lighting levels.
The closest station is Tottenham Hale station (Victoria line, National Rail, Stansted Express), approximately a 12–18 minute walk from the venue. This is the most direct route and is generally flat.
